rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious POST Request Towards Wordpress Site

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious POST Request Towards Wordpress Site
id: 22e38465-8ef1-4058-964c-11f921653674
description: Detects abnormal POST requests towards Wordpress websites without cs-referer
  set, common characteristics for malware using compromised Wordpress sites for hosting
  C2.
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2023-06-09'
references:
- https://securelist.com/goldenjackal-apt-group/109677/
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|startswith: /wp-
    c-uri|endswith: .php
    cs-method: POST
    cs-referer: ''
  filter:
  - c-uri|startswith: /wp-admin
  - c-uri:
    - /wp-content/plugins/matomo/app/matomo.php
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Legitimate scripts running on Wordpress sites.
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
